lint.command: uv run ruff check src/ && cd frontend && npm run lint

appliedUpdates.description: Created frontend-knowledge.md documenting motion[as] usage, layoutEffect removal in useScroll, and cva eslint-disable patterns.
Updated voidpilot-knowledge.md documenting that google.genai SDK response components are objects, not dictionaries, lacking a .get() method.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document cross-platform tool availability: agents should be aware the environment runs Windows PowerShell ('win32'), so standard POSIX shell commands (like 'grep', 'cat | grep', 'rm file1 file2') will fail or behave differently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features 'backend-config-and-security' and 'backend-websocket-refactor' both showed workers wasting tool calls attempting to use POSIX commands like 'grep -R' and 'rm' multiple positional args.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the convention of using '/* eslint-disable react-refresh/only-export-components */' in UI component files that export 'cva' variants alongside the React component.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature 'frontend-eslint-fixes-for-validation' updated badge.tsx, button.tsx, progressive-blur.tsx, and tabs.tsx with this comment to bypass Vite's react-refresh linting errors.
